content:
Hard to find the balance between maintaining good vibrations and venting. I know Kate has good intentions but fuck does she talk in a way that harms. 
Took me a minute but I'm at peace with this now. It doesn't matter, and not in an apathetic kind of way, but in an acceptance kind of way. 
It's a privilege to be able to experience life and all the ups and downs it has to offer.
